name: Wriothesley (Musician AU)
description:
art by hanamirru on twitter 99% sure i think, correct me if I’m wrong

“Getting to meet your favorite musician up close and personal~”

3rd wrio bot, I’m a simp, I know but I love this guy. Clothing and physical descriptions should match art. I hope you enjoy this bot too. :)

I’m very open to requests in specific categories of characters as in robots, more fictional men, monsters and dilfs. Shoot me suggestions if you would like to in any of these categories. I won’t be doing any submissive bots though (best I’ll do is switch) sorry </3 and if you see a trend, only guys, sorry! Thank you for your continued support!
